title: The Girl from Calgary
writer: Lee Chadwick, Leon D'Usseau, Sid Schlager
actors: Fifi D'Orsay, Paul Kelly, Robert Warwick
plot: A French-Canadian girl is a champion bronc rider and is also a nightclub singer. An ambitious young man sees her act one night and is struck by her talent, realizing that she is good enough to become a Broadway star. He convinces ...
